privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available SQLite sample database from the official GitHub repository (lerocha/chinook-database) containing digital media store data spanning January 2009 to December 2013 with 412 invoices. The task requires implementing SQL window functions (LAG, SUM OVER, AVG OVER, RANK OVER with PARTITION BY) to calculate monthly revenue trends including cumulative revenue, month-over-month growth percentage, 3-month moving average, and yearly ranking. The ground truth generation query in setup_task.sh is correct and produces 60 rows of properly calculated metrics with 2 decimal place rounding.
